description: Use recommended Drizzle ORM for DemandRadar storage while preserving repository boundaries.

tasks.title: Add Drizzle schema and database wrapper
criteria: Drizzle schema defines all existing tables, indexes, and foreign keys
openDatabase exposes an ORM-backed database while preserving close() usage
Storage migration escape hatch stays isolated in storage

tasks.title: Migrate repository operations to Drizzle
criteria: Repository writes and reads use Drizzle ORM APIs
Existing repository public methods keep behavior

tasks.title: Update scripts/tests and verify
criteria: A/B script uses repository/ORM access instead of direct SQL
Tests cover ORM-backed round trip and access guard
typecheck, tests, and fixture E2E pass
